CurrentIssues.ID: CognitiveComplexMethod:ArticlesListScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun ArticlesListScreen( attributes: ArticlesListAttributes, actions: ArticlesListActions, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
LongMethod:ArticleDetailScreen.kt$@Composable internal fun ArticleDetailContent(article: Article, modifier: Modifier = Modifier)

LongMethod:ArticlesListScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun ArticlesListScreen( attributes: ArticlesListAttributes, actions: ArticlesListActions, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

MaxLineLength:ArticleDetailScreenPreviews.kt$summary = "In a historic milestone, SpaceX's Starship completed its first crewed mission to the Red Planet, carrying a team of 12 astronauts. The mission marks the beginning of a new era in interplanetary travel."
MaxLineLength:ArticlesListScreen.kt$text = if (attributes.searchQuery.isNotEmpty()) "No results found" else "No articles available"
MaxLineLength:ArticlesListScreenPreviews.kt$summary = "The James Webb Space Telescope has identified a distant exoplanet with an atmosphere containing significant amounts of water vapor."
